vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 1 of #845 triage v1: cache infra + #583 injection quarantine. Implements `.deft-cache/issues/<repo>/<N>.{json,md}` local mirror, `task triage:cache` (populate), `task triage:show` (inspect), gitcrawl install/wrapper. Owner: Agent A1 (wave 1, parallel with A2).

plan.title: feat(scripts,tasks): triage cache infra + #583 quarantine on cache path

narratives.Problem: Refinement currently calls `gh issue view <N>` per item per evaluation pass. Token cost is O(N) per pass and rate-limited. Need a local cache so subsequent passes are O(1). #583 documents an injection-quarantine requirement that has not been implemented on the cache path.
narratives.Overview: Implement a sidecar issue cache at `.deft-cache/issues/<owner>-<repo>/<N>.json` (raw API response) and `.deft-cache/issues/<owner>-<repo>/<N>.md` (rendered, quarantined body). `task triage:cache` populates from `gh issue list --state open` (or `gitcrawl` if available); `task triage:show <N>` prints the cached body. Quarantine wraps any inline content that could be parsed as agent instructions (per #583).
narratives.Constraint: MUST NOT depend on other story scopes for v1 ship. Tests run standalone via `pytest tests/test_triage_cache.py`. Cache directory MUST be added to `.gitignore`. gitcrawl is OPTIONAL (auto-install via `task triage:cache --install-gitcrawl` flag); fallback to `gh issue list` when not present.
narratives.Outcome: Running `task triage:cache --repo deftai/directive` populates `.deft-cache/issues/deftai-directive/*.json` + `.md` for all open issues. Running `task triage:show 845` prints the rendered quarantined body. Tests cover: happy-path populate, idempotent re-populate, stale-cache detection (mtime + ETag), quarantine of injection-shaped content (instructions in code fences), gitcrawl-not-installed fallback, --repo arg validation.
narratives.Test: pytest tests/test_triage_cache.py covering: (1) populate from gh fixture; (2) re-populate is idempotent (mtime preserved on no-change); (3) quarantine wraps suspicious content per #583 spec (any markdown heading containing 'STEP' / 'TASK:' / similar imperative tokens gets fenced into ```quarantined blocks); (4) gitcrawl absent -> graceful fallback to gh; (5) malformed --repo string -> friendly error.
narratives.Action: Implement scripts/triage_cache.py with public functions: `populate(repo: str, force: bool=False) -> int`; `show(issue_number: int, repo: str) -> str`; `is_stale(path: Path, ttl_seconds: int) -> bool`. Implement scripts/quarantine_ext.py with `quarantine_body(raw_md: str) -> str`. Wire tasks/triage-cache.yml as a STANDALONE Taskfile fragment (not yet wired into parent Taskfile.yml; that wiring is owned by Story 6). Add `.deft-cache/` line to .gitignore.

items.title: tasks/triage-cache.yml exposes triage:cache + triage:show targets (standalone; not yet wired into parent Taskfile)
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry: feat(triage): local issue cache + #583 quarantine (#845 Story 1)

references.title: Epic vBRIEF for #845 (related-plan; planRef captures parent semantic)
